summary: Iteration 9 Complete - Analysis module merged into Home Dashboard. All 17 features verified successfully.

issues: Route shows blank page instead of 404 or redirect - React Router renders nothing for undefined nested routes. Minor UX issue.

seed_data_creation: No new seed data - used existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Analysis module successfully merged into Home Dashboard.
